bug_locations.reason: The 'additionalProperties' field uses 'Union[bool, Any]' which can cause schema dictionaries to be incorrectly evaluated or coerced to booleans due to Pydantic's left-to-right Union evaluation order.
The 'additionalProperties' field uses 'Union[bool, SchemaBase]'. Placing 'bool' first can lead to improper coercion of schema definitions into booleans, dropping nested constraints.
